lines: The FIFA World Cup is in full swing here in the U.S., so every day feels like a soccer festival.
The Indiana Fever (9-7, third in the East) fell to Atlanta 113-96 yesterday, but Caitlin Clark is averaging about 21 a game.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 7-4 yesterday, and they’ll face them again at home today at 2:08 PM ET.
Escape hatch: you follow this way closer than I do.
